content.text:
I don't just build interfaces — I design digital experiences. My work focuses on creating responsive, interactive web applications that feel intentional and alive.

Currently specializing in React + TypeScript on the frontend and Java Spring Boot on the backend.

Having lived and studied across multiple countries, I’ve developed a global mindset that influences both my collaboration style and technical decisions.

Currently based in Berlin, completing my Bachelor's in Software Engineering.

My journey began with Unity & C#, where I learned to think visually and architect interactive systems. Working with Blender strengthened my design awareness and appreciation for detail.

This early exposure shaped the way I approach frontend architecture today — combining logic with visual storytelling.

I explored Python application development (Kivy) and experimented with projects such as facial recognition systems.

These experiences taught me how to move from concept to implementation while maintaining clean, maintainable code.

I transitioned from the MERN stack toward a strongly typed React + TypeScript frontend architecture.

On the backend, I am diving deeper into Java and scalable system design principles.

My next step is mobile-first application development. I am building personal projects to expand into cross-platform and native mobile systems while continuing to refine my understanding of clean architecture and responsive design.
